description: Manage SendFox contacts, lists, campaigns, audience snapshots, bulk imports, and signup-form handoffs from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Account Snapshot
novel_features.description: One read-only operating snapshot across /me, lists, contacts, and campaigns.

novel_features.name: Audience Map
novel_features.description: Map contacts to lists and surface contacts without list memberships for segmentation cleanup.

novel_features.name: Campaign Digest
novel_features.description: Summarize campaign count, status mix, and recent campaigns.

novel_features.name: Contacts Onboard
novel_features.description: Create a contact and attach list memberships in one automation-aware command with dry-run call preview.

novel_features.name: Contacts Import CSV
novel_features.description: Bulk-create contacts from CSV after a required dry-run/--yes safety gate.

novel_features.name: Forms Generate
novel_features.description: Generate a self-contained signup form handoff with server-side SendFox proxy guidance.
